task_completion.description: Navigate to the Mid-Atlantic Ridge coordinates (approx 30°N, 42°W)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application viewport shows the globe or map centered approximately at latitude 30°N and longitude 42°W. Coordinates may be visible in the status bar.

task_completion.description: Capture and save the water surface screenshot
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent saves a file named 'atlantic_surface.png' to the Documents folder. The image content shows the blue water surface texture covering the ocean.

task_completion.description: Disable the Water Surface layer to reveal bathymetry
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the application sidebar (e.g., 'Layers' or 'View' panel), the checkbox for 'Water Surface' or 'Ocean Surface' is unchecked, or the map view visually changes from blue water to underwater terrain.

task_completion.description: Capture and save the bathymetry screenshot
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent saves a file named 'atlantic_bathymetry.png' to the Documents folder. The image content shows the underwater terrain/topography (bathymetry) without the water surface.

task_completion.description: Create a placemark with the correct name
task_completion.visual_evidence: A placemark dialog is open or a pin appears on the map with the label 'Mid-Atlantic Rift Valley'.

task_completion.description: Verify the placemark is positioned on the central rift valley
task_completion.visual_evidence: The placemark is located centrally within the rift valley structure (the depression running along the ridge spine) within the bounds of Lat 28-32°N, Lon 40-45°W.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacts with a GIS/Earth application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking within a mapping application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble) rather than just editing files.

integrity.description: Verify images are not generated via terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not use terminal commands like 'touch', 'cp', or 'convert' to create the .png files without actual visual capture.

integrity.description: Verify navigation is performed via search or manual movement
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the search bar to type coordinates or drags/zooms the globe, rather than modifying configuration files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target coordinates are approximately 30.11667°N, -42.11667°W. The region of interest is bounded by Latitude 28.0 to 32.0 and Longitude -45.0 to -40.0. The 'surface' view should show blue water; the 'bathymetry' view should show the textured ocean floor. The placemark 'Mid-Atlantic Rift Valley' must be placed within the rift valley structure in this region.
